alternatives.name: Custom cold-drawn precision stainless steel instrument profile (near-net-shape) — ZOLLERN
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week tooling lead time for new geometry; >=100 kg min batch; requires ISO 10993 biocompatibility documentation; +-0.02 mm tolerance; Ra <= 0.4 um; ~15% share [SRC: JTBD_medical_instruments]

alternatives.name: Standard stainless steel round/flat/hex bar stock (full machining in-house)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 40-70% material waste; high machining cost and cycle time; widely available from multiple distributors (Sandvik, Bohler, Carpenter); no tooling NRE; ~55% share [SRC: VN_medical_instruments]

alternatives.name: Drop-forged instrument blank (closed-die, near-net-shape)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Forging die investment 5-20K EUR; forging-specific surface texture requires full finishing; 4-8 week die lead time; ~20% share. Dominant in Tuttlingen cluster (Aesculap, KLS Martin) [SRC: BOM_medical_instruments]

alternatives.name: MIM (metal injection molding) pre-form
alternatives.tradeoffs: Size-limited (< 50 g typical); shrinkage tolerance +-0.3%; debinding and sintering add process steps; growing for disposable and endoscopic components; ~10% share [SRC: JTBD_medical_instruments]

alternatives.name: Do nothing — continue with current bar stock supplier (status quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero switching cost; zero qualification effort; hidden cost in material waste (40-70%) and CNC capacity consumption
